briefdescription.para: Contains a minimal set of functions for the XHdmiphy1 driver that allow access to all of the Video PHY core's functionality.

detaileddescription.para: See xhdmiphy1.h for a detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
dd/mm/yy
1.0 gm 10/12/18 Initial release. 1.1 ku 17/05/20 Adding uniquification to avoid clash with vphy 1.2 ssh 07/26/21 Added definitions for registers and masks

detaileddescription.para: See xhdmiphy1.h for a detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
dd/mm/yy
1.0 gm 10/12/18 Initial release. 1.1 ssh 22/02/23 Updated Line Rate Configurations
